panels.title: RVs
panels.description: Current matching RVs.

panels.title: RVRs
panels.description: Current matching RVRs.

panels.title: RVAs
panels.description: Current matching RVAs.

panels.title: Unhealthy RVRs
panels.description: Current RVRs in degraded-like phases.

panels.title: Deleting RVs
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVs with deletionTimestamp. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: Deleting RVRs
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVRs with deletionTimestamp. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: RV Create Avg
panels.description: Average RV initial formation time over the selected dashboard range. Uses completed RV initial formation observations only.

panels.title: RV Create P90
panels.description: P90 RV initial formation time over the selected dashboard range. Uses completed RV initial formation observations only.

panels.title: Backing Volume P90
panels.description: P90 time from RVR creation to BackingVolumeReady over the selected dashboard range. Useful as LLV/LVM provisioning proxy; thresholds are intentionally conservative and may depend on volume size/backend.

panels.title: RVR Count by Node
panels.description: Current RVR counts by node and storage class. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RVA Count by Node
panels.description: Current RVA counts by node and storage class. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RVR Count by Node / Phase
panels.description: Current non-zero RVR count split by node, storage class, and phase. Controlled by the RVR Phase selector. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RVA Count by Node / Phase
panels.description: Current non-zero RVA count split by node, storage class, and phase. Controlled by the RVA Phase selector. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Duration P90
panels.description: P90 time from RV creation to first completed initial datamesh formation. Completion is detected like CSI readiness: datameshRevision > 0 and no active Formation transition. This is not RV IOReady.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Completed Count
panels.description: Completed initial formation observations in each dashboard rate interval. Use this to see how many RV create operations reached the first formed datamesh state.

panels.title: RVR Transition To Ready Duration P10
panels.description: P10 duration of RVR Ready condition transitions from non-True to True. This highlights the fastest successful transitions and can help spot very fast recovery/flap patterns. Deleting RVRs are excluded.

panels.title: RVR Transition To Ready Duration Avg
panels.description: Average duration of RVR Ready condition transitions from non-True to True. Use together with P10/P90 to understand whether slow transitions are isolated or common.

panels.title: RVR Transition To Ready Duration P90
panels.description: P90 duration of RVR Ready condition transitions from non-True to True. This highlights slow starts or recoveries. Deleting RVRs are excluded.

panels.title: RVR Ready Transition Count by Node
panels.description: Ready transitions completed in each dashboard rate interval by node. Compare with cluster total to spot flapping concentrated on one node.

panels.title: Backing Volume / LVM Proxy P90
panels.description: P90 time from RVR creation to BackingVolumeReady, used as LLV/LVM provisioning proxy. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

panels.title: Backing Volume / LVM Proxy Completed Count
panels.description: Completed BackingVolumeReady observations in each dashboard rate interval. Compare with RVR phases to see whether provisioning is moving.

panels.title: RVA Ready / Detach P90
panels.description: RVA attach and detach duration by node. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

panels.title: RVA Ready / Detach Completed Count
panels.description: Completed RVA attach and detach operations in each dashboard rate interval.

panels.title: RV/RVR Deletion Duration P90
panels.description: Deletion duration percentiles. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

panels.title: DRBDR Configure / Delete P90
panels.description: SDS-specific DRBDResource lifecycle duration from agent metrics. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

panels.title: DRBDR Configure / Delete Completed Count
panels.description: Completed DRBDResource configure and delete operations in each dashboard rate interval.

panels.title: DRBD Runtime Problems
panels.description: Current DRBD runtime problem counts by node. Zero means no matching problem.

targets.expr: sum by (node) (drbd_connection_state{node=~"$node",drbd_connection_state!="UpToDate",drbd_connection_state!="Connected"} == 1) or on(node) (0 * sum by (node) (drbd_connection_state{node=~"$node"}))
sum by (node) (drbd_device_quorum{node=~"$node"} == 0) or on(node) (0 * sum by (node) (drbd_device_quorum{node=~"$node"}))
sum by (node) (drbd_device_unintentionaldiskless{node=~"$node"} == 1) or on(node) (0 * sum by (node) (drbd_device_unintentionaldiskless{node=~"$node"}))

panels.title: DRBD Out-of-Sync Bytes
panels.description: Existing DRBD exporter metric aligned with DRBD alert rules. Non-zero values indicate replication lag.

panels.title: Datamesh Completed Transition Count
panels.description: Completed Datamesh transitions in each dashboard rate interval by storage class, node, and type. Zero-only series are hidden unless they had activity during the selected interval.

targets.expr: sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__rate_interval])) and on(storage_class, node, type) (sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__range])) > 0)

panels.title: Datamesh Transition / Step P90
panels.description: Datamesh transition and step duration. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.90, sum(rate(sds_rv_datamesh_step_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, storage_class, node, type, step))

panels.title: Deleting RV Current Count by Storage Class
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVs with deletionTimestamp by storage class. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: RV Deletion Completed Count
panels.description: Completed RV deletions in each dashboard rate interval. Compare with current deleting count: growing current with low completed count points to stuck deletion.

panels.title: Deleting RVR Current Count by Node and Storage Class
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVRs with deletionTimestamp by node and storage class. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: RVR Deletion Completed Count
panels.description: Completed RVR deletions in each dashboard rate interval. Compare with current deleting count: growing current with low completed count points to stuck deletion.

panels.title: Datamesh Transitions
panels.description: Active Datamesh transitions and completed transition count per dashboard rate interval. Series are shown only after they were non-zero during the selected interval.

targets.expr: sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__rate_interval])) and on(storage_class, node, type) (sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__range])) > 0)

panels.title: Metrics Collector Duration
panels.description: Duration of SDS current metrics collector runs. Use this together with Prometheus scrape duration if the /metrics target becomes slow.

panels.title: Metrics Collector Objects
panels.description: Number of objects processed by the current metrics collector by kind.

panels.title: Metrics Collector Errors
panels.description: Collector errors over the selected range.

panels.title: Prometheus Scrape Duration
panels.description: Prometheus-side scrape duration for likely SDS/controller targets. This includes the whole /metrics endpoint, not only the current metrics collector.
